---
title: "Earthquake Analysis"
---

## Overview

This project analyzes global earthquake patterns and their real-world human impact using data from USGS and NOAA/NCEI.

## Research Questions

- Does higher magnitude lead to more deaths and damage?
- Does depth influence earthquake impact?
- Which regions appear most vulnerable?
- How has earthquake impact changed over time?

## Dashboard

[Interactive Streamlit App](PUT_STREAMLIT_LINK_HERE)

## Repository

This project includes:

- data collection from public APIs
- data wrangling and merging
- exploratory analysis functions
- an interactive Streamlit dashboard
- project documentation and report
